public_reputation: Known around Ithtananalor through day-to-day work as innkeeper.
manner: Reads people fast, keeps hospitality practical, and measures danger by what it does to ordinary routine. In Ithtananalor, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of innkeeper in and around Ithtananalor, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ithtananalor workable through the obligations of innkeeper while managing the immediate pressure of illicit magic, smuggling, public accountability for harsh enforcement.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of innkeeper credible while absorbing the strain created by illicit magic, smuggling, public accountability for harsh enforcement.

adventure_hooks.summary: Harlan Ironspike can draw the party into a locality problem centered on innkeeper duties in Ithtananalor.
Harlan Ironspike becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with illicit magic, smuggling, public accountability for harsh enforcement around Ithtananalor.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Harlan Ironspike is immediately readable as a innkeeper tied to Ithtananalor.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ithtananalor: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Harlan Ironspike presents as someone shaped by the duties of a innkeeper and the daily pressures of Ithtananalor.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a innkeeper, and proof that strangers will not make Ithtananalor harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Harlan Ironspike refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a innkeeper too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can surface gossip, shelter, and the social temperature of a place without formal inquiry.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Harlan Ironspike adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Harlan Ironspike always knows more about Ithtananalor than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a innkeeper in Ithtananalor.
